title: The First Awakening
description: The king's golem has been stirring. Three test results have been recorded — use them, plus a research note, to determine which two ingredients will animate it.

hints.text:
The golem reacts to SIZE, not sign. The chest reacts to a specific color+size combination. The research note tells you the chest reacts to Red.
Known tests:
  — ingredient 1: chest ✓ ears ✓ → ANIMATOR
  — ingredient 2: chest ✗ ears ✓ → ears-only
  — ingredient 3: chest ✓ ears ✓ → ANIMATOR
  — ingredient 7: chest ✗ ears ✗ → non-reactive
Two ingredients triggered both reactions (1 and 3) — those are the animators. The chest reacts to Large Red; the ears react to Small Green. An animator needs both: Large Red AND Small Green aspects.

Ingredient 1 maps to Nnp(5): R−L G−S B+S — has Large Red ✓, Small Green ✓. Animator.
Ingredient 3 maps to Ppn(6): R+L G+S B−S — has Large Red ✓, Small Green ✓. Animator.
The animators are ingredients 1 and 3.
